designSystem.style: Earthy dark-first design with warm forest greens and terracotta accents. Clean card-based layouts with urgency-coded color indicators (red/amber/green). Rounded pill typography, soft glow shadows on urgent items, and gradient hero elements for key stats. Supports full light and dark themes.

screens: Pantry – Live urgency-coded ingredient map with scan options (photo, receipt, barcode), filter pills, and expiry progress bars
Recipes – Urgency-ranked recipe cards with energy selector, waste scores, expandable step-by-step instructions, and ingredient chips
Alerts – Rescue window notifications with dismissible alert cards, action chips (freeze/pickle/use), tip expansion, and household activity feed
Stats – Waste scoreboard with streak hero, money/CO₂/item metrics, weekly bar chart, household leaderboard, and category breakdown
Settings – Theme toggle (light/dark), household sync with invite, notification toggles, and cooking preferences
